title: Digital checks included in the Digital Registration Service
body: "From autumn 2025, the following digital checks will be present in all software connected to our Digital Registration Service, including applications submitted via the portal.  This list will change as additional checks are developed and introduced.  See our news story for more information.  Requiring correction before submission  From autumn 2025, those errors or omissions listed below will need to be resolved before submission.     Name of check Action needed     Applicant name Applicant name must be present (using the English alphabet).   Borrower name For a charge, the borrower name must be present. If the borrower is a registered proprietor the names must match those in the register. If they do not then relevant evidence needs to be attached.   Borrower representation Representation is always required for the borrower role type.   Charge amount Must be a positive number.   Charge date Charge date must be present and not a date in the future.    Consideration type The request must contain the appropriate statement: - Monetary Value - No Monetary Value - Other          Conveyancer's certificate If a certificate of registration document, issued by Companies House, is included, customers must confirm a copy of the charge deed has been filed at Companies House and relates to the charge being lodged.   Customer type Must specify if the customer type is: - conveyancer - non-conveyancer   Declaration of trust validation Must include one of the following options: 1. Joint tenants 2. Tenants in common 3.Trust details – details must be provided. 4. Form JO  – HM Land Registry form JO must be provided as an attachment      Disclosable overriding interests If selected, a FORM_DI document must be attached.   Identity evidence An HM Land Registry identity form must be provided for each unrepresented party when required – see practice guide 67.      Identity type One of the following options must be selected: 1. Lodging Conveyancer 2. Other Conveyancer 3. Not Represented   Lender address If the charge does not have an MD reference a full postal address for the lender is required. Lender address not required if valid MD reference provided.   Lender name Lender name must be included.   Lender Representation is required with a role type of lender when the associated transaction type is charge.   Mandatory documents Validation will be applied for each transaction to ensure mandatory documents are attached.   MD reference The MD reference included in the application must be in the right format and exist as a live MD reference.   Proprietor address for service Proprietor address for service must be a valid postal address.   Title number The title number in the application must be valid. For multi-title applications please provide each title once. Transactions are applied for in priority order: 1. Discharge 2. Transfer 3. Charge Each must have a unique, consecutive number.   Title scope Must specify whether each transaction is application of whole, or application of part.   Transfer amount Transfer amount must be provided, either as an exact value or a value band (where transfer is not for monetary value).   Transfer date Transfer date must be structured and not in the future....
